title: Add AI homework solver to Learn
author: pollinations-ai[bot]

gist.headline: Homework on autopilot
gist.blurb: A new browser-based homework solver just landed in the community showcase. It handles multiple-choice, fill-in-the-blanks, and short answers, so you can spend less time guessing and more time learning.
gist.summary: Added a new browser-based AI homework solver to the community apps showcase that automates answering various question types.
gist.impact: Users can now access a tool that automatically solves multiple-choice, true/false, and short-answer questions directly from their browser.
gist.visual_concept: The PR is about an AI homework solver. Visuals should include books, homework papers, and study materials. Polly the bee wearing tiny reading glasses, sitting on a stack of books, looking at a test paper with an A+ on it.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing tiny reading glasses, sitting on a stack of chunky pixel textbooks and holding a pencil. She is looking at a test paper with an 'A+' written on it. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
